title: taraxacum tetricum
intro: Taraxacum tetricum, also known as the bitter dandelion or autumn dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its bitter and slightly sweet properties, which are believed to have medicinal effects on the digestive system and liver. The plant's root is particularly valued for its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the liver's natural detoxification processes, providing relief from various health issues such as jaundice and indigestion. Taraxacum tetricum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and those seeking natural remedies.
